author: doll-agent
content:
Add 6 memmap tests covering 2D and 3D paths in src/memmap.rs:
- memmap_readonly_2d_shape_and_data (3x4 f64)
- memmap_readonly_3d_shape_and_data (2x3x4 i32)
- memmap_readwrite_2d_persists (modify (1,2) element, verify persistence)
- memmap_view_3d_strides_match_row_major (logical layout reconstruction)
- memmap_open_memmap_2d_readonly (numpy-shaped entry point)
- memmap_copy_on_write_2d_isolates_changes (CoW doesn't touch file)
